description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events for all branches except travis_ccache. The workflow has three jobs: clang-format, build. The clang-format job checks code formatting using DoozyX/clang-format-lint-action. The build job runs a matrix of builds across different operating systems (Windows, Ubuntu, macOS) and generators (Visual Studio, Unix Makefiles, Ninja), with various configurations, and performs cmake, build, and test steps.
